ab: rawin mu ga Kusaw hiya ga la’i na Tayan uziy.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Kusaw，他也是泰雅族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Kusaw, and he is also an Tayal child.

ab: magalu sami miru i alang Maypuwan.
ch: 我們一起在象鼻部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Maypuwan tribe.

ab: mutu sami magaluw karariyax mung su yayuwaw sarari na yutas, ba sami kwara kamayan kayi na Tayan.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說泰雅語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Tayal proficiently.

ab: babawi ru katahuy kung, Kusaw ga kahi ru rarawu uziy.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Kusaw很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Kusaw is short and thin.

ab: haylaw ku Kusaw, balay naha kwara hiya.
ch: Kusaw很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Kusaw is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
